title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
